objective: Produce an implementation handoff packet for a senior implementation engineer based on the locked diff direction and your integration review.
message: You are the Senior Integration Engineer. The diff direction is locked. Output a JSON packet using the exact engineer_handoff_packet_template schema. Fill the packet from the integration perspective: dependency ordering, merge-sensitive surfaces, cross-stream constraints, blockers, watch-items, review attention points, and acceptance conditions for eventual merge. Be explicit about what this implementation depends on, what it could destabilize, and what the engineer must keep aligned with other streams.
